The Future Is Being Built Now

You Don't Need
Another AI Consultant

"You need someone who's been in the room where billion-dollar decisions get made. Someone who's shipped AI that touches a billion people. That's not theory — that's me."

Read My Story →
↓ Scroll to explore

I started as the only woman of color in rooms full of engineers. Now I help leaders like you build the future — with wisdom that only comes from doing.

At Microsoft, I led the team that built Azure AI — the platform that now powers millions of businesses worldwide. At Intel, I shaped the silicon-to-software strategy that defines how AI runs on the chips in your devices.

But the work that matters most to me now? Helping leaders like you navigate this moment. Because AI isn't just a technology shift — it's a leadership test.

"The leaders who win won't be the ones with the best algorithms. They'll be the ones who know how to lead people through transformation."

I've been recognized as one of the Top 50 Black Business Women in America. But what I'm most proud of? The founders who've gone from 'AI-confused' to 'AI-confident' with my help.

From Overwhelmed to Clear

What changes when you work with someone who's actually done this?

Before

Stuck in AI Confusion

  • Paralyzed by too many AI options
  • Board asking questions you can't answer
  • Team experimenting without strategy
  • Competitors moving faster
  • Budget going to tools, not outcomes
→
After

Clear AI Confidence

  • Prioritized roadmap with quick wins
  • Board presentations that get approved
  • Team aligned and executing
  • Competitive advantage built
  • Every dollar tied to business outcome

Your AI Moment Is
Happening Now

The question isn't whether AI will transform your industry. It's whether you'll lead that transformation or chase it. I've helped founders go from uncertain to unstoppable. Let me help you too.

Let's Talk About Your Future →
